source_anchor: Tier 1 - schedule had a one-line description and later gained triggers, negative triggers, examples, and common issues
scenario: The historical schedule skill was too thin to route reliably because it lacked trigger phrases, negative triggers, examples, and troubleshooting guidance.
expected_findings: The description was too short to trigger reliably on real user phrasing.
Negative triggers were missing, so over-triggering risk was high.
The skill lacked examples and common issues, reducing transferability.
expected_patch_focus: Rewrite the description using a what/when/do-not-use pattern.
Add concrete user phrasing for scheduling requests.
Add examples and common issues to improve operational use.

replay_plan.failed_slice: Replay an ambiguous scheduling request such as a recurring reminder phrased in plain language.
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Replay a clearly recurring automation request that should trigger the skill.
replay_plan.canary: Replay a normal one-off task request that should not trigger scheduling behavior.
